column1: # Example: multiple scope BLOCKS in one CSV.
# The CSV is now a sequence of blocks. Each block is:
#     scope: <GroupSpec>  [folder: <OutName>]
#     Width
#     <rows...>
# - Each block reads from its own scope and writes to its own OUT/<folder>/.
# - The SAME scope may appear in several blocks (different folders
# - "folder:" is optional; omit it and the folder defaults to the scope's name.
# - Paths resolve INSIDE that block's scope (name or [index]); a Path on a group
#   flattens it to one image. Hidden layers/groups export anyway.
# - Adjust group/layer names to match your PSD.
# --- Block 1: low symbols from Symbols [ALL] -> OUT/main/ ---
scope: Symbols [ALL]  folder: main
Width
# --- Block 2: SAME scope
# Each Jackpots sub-group is flattened into a single image.
scope: Symbols [ALL]  folder: bonus
Width
# --- Block 3: folder omitted -> writes to OUT/Symbols [ALL]/ ---
# Nested output folder names are allowed too: e.g. "folder: pages/extras".
scope: Symbols [ALL]
Width
